task_completion.description: Navigate to the Document Sequence configuration window
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Document Sequence' window or tab is open in the iDempiere web interface.

task_completion.description: Create a new sequence named 'Purchase Order 2025'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Document Sequence record is visible with the 'Name' field explicitly set to 'Purchase Order 2025'.

task_completion.description: Set the Prefix and Increment values
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the sequence configuration form, the 'Prefix' field contains 'PO25-' and the 'Increment' (or 'Increment No') field contains '1'.

task_completion.description: Set the Start No and Current Next values
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the sequence configuration form, both the 'Start No' and 'Current Next' fields are set to '1000'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Document Type window and locate 'Purchase Order'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Document Type' window or tab is open, and the specific record for the 'Purchase Order' document type is selected and visible.

task_completion.description: Assign the new sequence to the Purchase Order Document Type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'Purchase Order' Document Type record, the 'Document Sequence' lookup or dropdown field is set to the newly created 'Purchase Order 2025'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the iDempiere web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere ERP system loaded in a web browser, not a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing psql or other database command-line tools being used to execute SQL INSERT/UPDATE statements.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely entered data into the ERP forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively typing into or selecting from the standard iDempiere form fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the iDempiere ERP system (accessed via web browser). The agent must create a Document Sequence exactly named 'Purchase Order 2025' with Prefix 'PO25-', Start No '1000', Current Next '1000', and Increment '1'. Finally, the agent must open the existing Document Type named 'Purchase Order' and set its Document Sequence field to the newly created 'Purchase Order 2025'.
